header.headline: IR Lowering Pipeline
header.subtitle: A deterministic compiler path from graph ops to lowered runtime artifacts.

ir1.title: IR1
ir1.body: Capture graph ops, dataflow edges, and kernel family intent.

ir2.title: IR2
ir2.body: Add scheduling decisions and kernel-variant selection.

lower.title: IR Lower
lower.body: Resolve pointers, call args, and runtime-facing dimensions.

layout.title: Memory Layout
layout.body: Bind buffers and offsets so lowered calls are concrete.

artifacts.title: Lowered Artifacts
artifacts.body: Write layout, lowered IR, and init-call metadata for runtime generation.

footer.note: Lowering stays deterministic because structure, memory planning, and runtime args are explicit.
